steps.title: Identify what the task requires
steps.content: The question asks the student to “emphasize a similarity” between the Choctaw Code Talkers and the Navajo Code Talkers. For an answer to accomplish this, it must reference both groups and identify what they have in common.

steps.title: Find the choice that accomplishes this goal
steps.content: Choice C opens with “Both the Choctaw Code Talkers and the Navajo Code Talkers transmitted coded military messages in the soldiers' native languages,” explicitly juxtaposing the two groups. The other choices either focus on only one group (A and B) or emphasize a timing difference (D). Comparison requires naming both and showing their common ground—and C does exactly that. That matches choice C — C is correct.
